strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to own and deliver complex systems from database to UI, including GIS and automation platforms
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership in dev tooling and architecture
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest senior-level experience, conflicting with entry-level role expectations
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience, key required technologies for this role
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures, with relevant experience in data-heavy platforms and developer tooling, but his senior-level background, mismatched tech stack exposure, and limited German proficiency raise questions about alignment with an entry-level, on-site role in Berlin.
